width.description: Width of the shimmer block. Accepts CSS values (e.g. "100%", 200) or a number treated as pixels.

borderRadius.description: Border radius of the shimmer block. Useful for circle avatars or pill shapes.

level.description: Background contrast level. Higher levels are darker.

animation.description: Animation style: a sweeping highlight ('shimmer') or a soft fade ('pulse').

loadingLabel.description: Visually-hidden text announced by screen readers (e.g., 'Loading content').

repeat.description: When set, render N stacked copies (typical for list shimmers). Adds a flex-column wrapper with a configurable gap.

gap.description: Spacing between repeated shimmers (when `repeat` is set).

className.description: Additional CSS classes applied to the root element.

width.description: Width of the line. Numbers are treated as pixels.

animated.description: Disable animation entirely (useful for testing or static placeholders).

loadingLabel.description: Visually-hidden text announced by screen readers.
Visually-hidden text announced by screen readers.

rows.description: Number of skeleton rows to render.

columns.description: Number of skeleton columns to render.

showHeader.description: Whether to show the skeleton header row.

bars.description: Number of bars to display in the skeleton chart.

showXAxis.description: Whether to render placeholder labels below the bars.

showYAxis.description: Whether to render placeholder labels to the left of the chart.
